# AGT Equipment

> AGT Equipment sells factory-direct mini excavators, mini skid steers,
> attachments, and replacement parts for US contractors, landowners,
> landscapers, farms, and property-maintenance teams.

## Canonical Site

- Website: https://miniironpro.com
- Brand: AGT Equipment
- Company: AGT Industrial Inc.
- Phone: +1 (949) 898-7669
- Email: info@agrotkindustrial.com
- Primary market: United States
- US warehouses:
  - California: 2602 Halladay Street, Santa Ana, CA 92707
  - Illinois: 6200 S Oak Park Ave, Chicago, IL 60638

## What AGT Equipment Sells

- Mini excavators from 1-4 tons for digging, trenching, backyard access, farm work, landscaping, foundations, utilities, and property maintenance.
- Mini skid steers and compact loaders for loading, grading, carrying material, landscaping, and attachment-driven work.
- Attachments including buckets, augers, hydraulic thumbs, brush cutters, hammers, pallet forks, trenchers, sweepers, grapples, snow-removal tools, and specialty attachments.
- Replacement parts and accessories including hydraulic parts, filters, tracks, electrical parts, hardware, and model-specific service parts.

## Purchase And Support Facts

- Factory-direct pricing.
- Free shipping within the continental United States.
- One-year warranty coverage on equipment.
- Equipment ships from California and Illinois warehouses.
- Kubota and RATO engine options are available across relevant models.
- Financing options are available for qualified customers.

## Common Questions

Q: What does AGT Equipment sell?
A: AGT Equipment sells mini excavators, mini skid steers, attachments, and replacement parts. Machines ship from US warehouses in California and Illinois with free continental US shipping and one-year warranty coverage.

Q: What size mini excavator should I choose?
A: A 1-ton excavator is best for backyard access, shallow trenching, landscaping, and light property work. A 1-2 ton model adds power and dig depth while staying relatively compact. A 3-4 ton model is better for contractors, foundations, utilities, and heavier excavation.

Q: Should I buy a mini excavator or a mini skid steer?
A: Choose a mini excavator when digging is the main job. Choose a mini skid steer when loading, grading, carrying material, and frequent attachment changes are the main tasks.

Q: Where does AGT Equipment ship from?
A: AGT Equipment ships from US warehouses in Santa Ana, California and Chicago, Illinois.

Q: Is shipping free?
A: Shipping is free within the continental United States.

Q: What warranty is included?
A: AGT equipment includes one-year warranty coverage for manufacturing defects and normal-use component failures, subject to warranty terms.

- Use the sitemap at https://miniironpro.com/sitemap.xml for the complete canonical URL list.
- Public product, category, solution, comparison, knowledge, FAQ, and support pages are intended for search and AI-answer indexing.
- Account, admin, auth, cart, checkout, inquiry, and API paths are not public knowledge sources.
